_comment: Default topic structure for pa-framework Telegram bot. Used by `pa bot setup-topics` to auto-create topics in a supergroup. Edit names/order/roles for your deployment. The bot must be an admin in the target supergroup with forum topics enabled.

topics.name: general-knowledge
topics.description: Default catch-all topic — quick questions, conversations that don't fit elsewhere.

topics.name: pa-alerts
topics.description: Automated framework alerts: worker failures, rate-limit events, bg-process leaks, evaluator parse errors.

topics.name: pa-support
topics.description: Manual debugging — pa CLI issues, scheduler problems, lock investigation, skill failures.

topics.name: daily-briefings
topics.description: Scheduled informational output — daily mail brief, weekly reports, calendar alerts.

topics.name: claude-support
topics.description: Debugging the claude worker — Claude API issues, prompt engineering, Claude-specific troubleshooting.

topics.name: zclaude-support
topics.description: Debugging the zclaude worker — zclaude-specific issues and worker failover scenarios.

topics.name: gemini-support
topics.description: Debugging the gemini worker — gemini-cli quirks, RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED, grounded search issues.

topics.name: codex-support
topics.description: Debugging the codex worker — codex-cli issues, /skill translation, output parsing.

topics.name: feature-changes
topics.description: Discussion about implementing changes to the framework / bot / skills.

topics.name: system-dashboard
topics.description: Pinned-message status card maintained automatically by the bot's dashboard.ts. First message sent here creates the dashboard.
